Popular Options

Choose Your Perfect Session

Approachable wellness for everyone. Each session is personalized to your needs.

Individual Massage

60 or 90 minutes

  • Swedish or Deep Tissue
  • Aromatherapy oils included
  • Customized pressure
  • Hot towel treatment
  • Calming music
Reserve Now
Most Popular

Couples Massage

60 or 90 minutes

  • Side-by-side experience
  • Two licensed therapists
  • Aromatherapy & hot towels
  • Champagne upgrade available
  • Perfect for special occasions
Reserve Now

Beach Experience

90 minutes

  • Beachfront setup
  • Ocean sounds & breeze
  • Professional massage table
  • Coconut oil treatment
  • Truly unique experience
Reserve Now

All sessions include consultation and personalized treatment. Contact us for custom packages.

Why Choose Us

The Elevate difference.

Friendly, professional, and dedicated to creating the perfect relaxation experience for you.

Licensed Therapists

All our massage therapists are licensed, insured, and have years of experience in therapeutic bodywork.

Convenient Mobile Service

We come to you anywhere in Kauai - your hotel, vacation rental, or favorite beach spot.

Relaxing Beachside Setup

Experience the magic of massage therapy with ocean waves and tropical breezes as your backdrop.

Personalized Treatments

Every session is customized to your needs, preferences, and comfort level. Your wellness, your way.

The Experience

Where Island Paradise
Meets Deep Relaxation

Imagine the gentle sound of waves, the warm Hawaiian sun, and skilled hands melting away every tension in your body.

This isn't just a massage — it's an escape into pure tranquility. Whether you're celebrating an anniversary, honeymoon, or simply treating yourself, we create moments you'll treasure forever.

60-90min

Session Options

100%

Customizable

Island-wide

Mobile Service

Client Stories

Loved by Visitors & Locals

Real experiences from real people who found their moment of peace with us.

"The couples massage on the beach was the highlight of our honeymoon. The sound of the waves, the professional setup, and the skilled therapists made it absolutely magical. Highly recommend!"

J

Jennifer & Mark

Seattle, WA

"I've had massages all over the world, and this was top-tier. The mobile service was so convenient - they came right to our vacation rental. Deep tissue was exactly what I needed after hiking the Na Pali Coast."

D

David L.

Los Angeles, CA

"We were nervous about finding quality massage on the island, but Elevate Wellness exceeded expectations. Friendly, professional, and the beachside experience was unforgettable. Thank you!"

A

Amanda & Chris

Chicago, IL

"I booked a last-minute appointment and they were able to accommodate us the same day. The therapist was amazing, and the convenience of mobile service made it so easy. Will definitely book again on our next trip!"

E

Emily R.

Denver, CO

Read more reviews on Google

Easy Booking

Reserve Your Session

Book online in minutes or call us directly. Same-day appointments often available.

Select Service

Choose from couples massage, mobile service, or beachside experience

Choose Time

Pick a date and time that works for your schedule

Location

Provide your hotel, rental, or preferred beach location

Confirm

Secure your booking with easy payment options

Book Now

Same-day appointments often available

Serving All of Kauai

Based in Kapa'a · Mobile Service Island-Wide

Elevate Wellness Kauai proudly offers premium massage services in Kauai, specializing in couples massage, mobile massage therapy, and unique beachside massage experiences. Based in Kapa'a, we provide convenient mobile services throughout the island, from Princeville to Poipu.

Whether you're staying in Princeville, Hanalei, Kapaa, Lihue, Koloa, or Poipu, our licensed massage therapists bring professional wellness services directly to you. From relaxing Swedish massage to therapeutic deep tissue, we customize every session to meet your needs.

Service Areas

Princeville · Hanalei · Kapa'a · Lihue · Koloa · Poipu
